description: Format the raw safety meeting notes at /home/ga/Documents/site_42_safety_minutes.docx. Apply 'Heading 1' to the main title and 'Heading 2' to all section headers. Create a custom paragraph style named 'Action Item' with a box border on all sides, a yellow background, and 0.50-inch left and right indents. Apply this 'Action Item' style to the four paragraphs starting with 'ACTION:'. Insert a Table of Contents at the top of the document after the title. Save the final document to /home/ga/Documents/site_42_formatted.docx.
